# Requirements Quality Checklist: Grafana-Style Public Dashboard and Participant Admin

**Purpose**: Validate specification completeness, clarity, and coverage before proceeding to technical planning and implementation.
**Created**: 2026-07-10
**Feature**: [../spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are the exact properties and expected data formats of the image URLs for "current status" defined? [Gap, Spec §FR-001]
- [ ] CHK002 Are the specific input fields, validation rules, and success/error feedback patterns defined for each manual log form? [Gap, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK003 Is the exact scope, confirmation dialog flow, and data impact of initiating a "tracker reset" specified? [Gap, Spec §FR-002]
- [ ] CHK004 Are static asset hosting and build constraints aligned with S3 & CloudFront Principle VII of the Constitution? [Completeness, Principle VII]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is the "Grafana Aesthetic" dark-theme palette, typography, and standard layout grid dimensions clearly defined? [Clarity, Spec §FR-003]
- [ ] CHK006 Is the configuration mechanism and user interface for setting the panel "auto-refresh" interval specified? [Clarity, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK007 Is the authorization header format (e.g. `Authorization: Bearer <key>` or custom header) for mutative forms explicitly defined? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005]
- [ ] CHK008 Are the specific mobile and desktop screen-size responsive breakpoints (using Bulma/pure CSS) documented? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK009 Do the panel visual toggles from Story 3 conflict with the "fixed, pre-configured layout" constraint in FR-007? [Conflict, Spec §FR-007 / Story 3]
- [ ] CHK010 Are local storage caching specifications in Assumption 3 fully aligned with the AdminSession key entity definition? [Consistency, Spec §Key Entities / Assumption 3]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK011 Is the "standard mobile connection" performance threshold quantified with specific network speed/latency metrics? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [ ] CHK012 Is "display correctly" defined with measurable visual standards to avoid subjective validation? [Measurability, Spec §SC-002]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK013 Are requirements defined for state preservation (e.g. storing user's layout toggles in LocalStorage or URL parameters)? [Coverage, Spec §Story 3]
- [ ] CHK014 Are rate-limiting, polling backoff, or connection-retry requirements defined for auto-refreshing public dashboard clients? [Coverage, Spec §FR-004]
- [ ] CHK015 Are loading state requirements specified for the initial dashboard render before API calls return? [Coverage, Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK016 Are the visual presentation and messaging specifications for the "Disconnected" or "Stale Data" states clearly documented? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK017 Does the spec define how the dashboard handles anomalous or extreme telemetry values (e.g., negative temperatures)? [Edge Case, Gap]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK018 Is the charting library dependency (e.g., Chart.js via CDN) formally documented as a functional constraint? [Dependency, Assumption 2]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
